main_message: V2X-RL preserves high mean return while reducing max drawdown versus V2X-B and outperforming official frozen foundation baselines.
The strategy remains robust to cost increases; limit-up and liquidity filters reveal where A-share alpha is concentrated.
V2X-B has hidden concentration despite Top30; geometry increases breadth; RL reduces capital exposure without reselecting stocks.
RL keeps full exposure most of the time and only reduces exposure in selected risk states.
RL reduces losses on worst base-policy days while preserving most upside on best days.
Temporal, cross-sectional, market-body, geometry, and exposure modules have distinct financial roles rather than being a flat expert stack.
